wordmark.purpose: The aylith wordmark. ONLY use. Set 500 weight, tracking -0.01em. Never substituted, never animated, never recolored beyond stroke inversion.

display.purpose: Hero headline. One per page maximum. Fluid clamp 2.5rem → 4.5rem.

headline.purpose: Section starts, card titles, the h2-class of the page.

title.purpose: Subsection labels, project names inside cards.

body-sm.purpose: Card descriptions, footer copy, secondary annotations.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions, btn-press, tilt, theme toggle. 150–250ms range.

motion.name: btn-press-active
motion.purpose: Button active press (translateY(1px), faster than hover).

motion.name: fade-in-up
motion.purpose: Reveal-on-enter for scroll-driven sections. Used sparingly; not on every block.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Tally Copper background, workshop-stone-50 text. Hover deepens to patinated copper and lifts 2px. Active drops 1px.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.66 0.13 50); color: #f8f7f4; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 500 0.9375rem/1.4 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.56 0.13 50); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.66 0.13 50); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); transition-duration: 80ms; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent at rest, fills with workshop-stone-100 on hover. Used for navigation, secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #332f29; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 500 0.9375rem/1.4 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f0eee9; color: #131110; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.66 0.13 50); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Flat-at-rest card with hover-revealed depth: copper-tinted radial cursor glow (12% alpha, follows pointer) and 4° tilt. Holds icon, name, tagline, description, category. The signature component of the portfolio grid.
components.html:
shipping

Plainbase

Talk to your database in plain English.

Natural-language BI for ops teams who don't want to write SQL.

Data & Analytics→
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 1.5rem; background: #f8f7f4; color: #131110; border: 1px solid rgba(225, 221, 211, 0.6); border-radius: 24px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 300ms ease, transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #c9c3b3; transform: scale(1.01); } .ds-card-icon { width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; color: oklch(0.66 0.13 50); } .ds-card-status { position: absolute; top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem; font: 500 0.75rem/1 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: #90897a; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-card-name { margin: 1rem 0 0; font: 700 1rem/1.3 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #131110; } .ds-card-tagline { margin: 0.25rem 0 0; font: 500 0.875rem/1.4 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.66 0.13 50); } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font: 400 0.875rem/1.55 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: #615b50; flex: 1; } .ds-card-foot { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 1.25rem; } .ds-card-cat { font: 500 0.75rem/1 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: #90897a; } .ds-card-arrow { color: #c9c3b3; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Plain rectangular field with copper border on focus. Background matches the canvas in both themes.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-input-lbl { font: 500 0.75rem/1 'DM Sans', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #46423a; } .ds-input { background: #f8f7f4; color: #131110; padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; border: 1px solid #c9c3b3; border-radius: 8px; font: 400 1rem/1.5 'DM Sans', sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.66 0.13 50); outline: 2px solid oklch(0.66 0.13 50); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Top-bar link. Active state: tally-copper-100 background + tally-copper-700 text in light mode.
components.html: MethodPortfolioAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-lnk { padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; border-radius: 8px; font: 500 0.9375rem/1 'DM Sans', sans-serif; color: #46423a; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-lnk:hover { background: #f0eee9; color: #131110; } .ds-nav-lnk--active { background: oklch(0.94 0.030 50); color: oklch(0.46 0.115 50); } .ds-nav-lnk:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.66 0.13 50); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tally Mark (Logo)
components.description: The aylith identity mark: four vertical stone strokes crossed by a single copper diagonal. Always paired with the Newsreader wordmark, never standalone. Don't animate.
components.html: aylith
components.css: .ds-mark-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; text-decoration: none; } .ds-mark { width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; } .ds-mark-word { font: 500 1.25rem/1 'Newsreader', 'Iowan Old Style', Georgia, serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #131110; }

narrative.overview:
Aylith.com is laid out like a small-press monograph that happens to be a portfolio. The wordmark is set in Newsreader the way a magazine masthead is set; the work below it sits on a warm-stone canvas the way letterpress sits on cotton; the single accent — copper, drawn from the tally-mark's diagonal — appears the way an editor's pencil-mark appears: rarely, with weight. The page is not engineered to convert. It is composed to be read.

The system rejects four neighboring lanes by name: generic SaaS gradient hell, AI-startup neon-on-black, enterprise B2B navy-and-gray, and Web3 / crypto neon-and-gradient. The first reflex for any AI/tools site in 2026 is one of these four. None of them are here.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-stone neutrals across both light and dark themes; no cool/violet tinting.
One accent (Tally Copper) used as a true accent: ≤10% of any given screen.
Three-family typography pairing: Newsreader for the wordmark, Space Grotesk for headlines, DM Sans for body. One face, one job.
Flat-by-default surfaces. Depth is motion (subtle hover-lift), not shadow.
No future-tense copy. No animations that exist only to delight. No equal-card grids.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Tally Copper appears on ≤10% of any given screen. The rarity is the point. No second accent for variety.

rules.name: The No-Cool-Tint Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is warm. There is no cool gray in the system. Pure #fff and pure #000 are prohibited.

rules.name: The Patinated-on-Hover Rule
rules.body: Copper deepens on hover (500 → 600), never lightens. Lighter-on-hover reads as weakening; deeper reads as commitment.

rules.name: The One-Face-One-Job Rule
rules.body: Newsreader is for the wordmark. Space Grotesk is for headings. DM Sans is for body. Crossing the lanes looks like a mistake.

rules.name: The Sacred Wordmark Rule
rules.body: Wordmark set in Newsreader 500, tracking -0.01em. Never recolor beyond stroke inversion. Never animate.

rules.name: The No-Aspirational-Copy Rule
rules.body: Past and present tense, never future. 'Built' not 'will build.' 'Ships' not 'will ship.'

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No box-shadow on cards or containers in default state. Reach for stronger borders or hover-only treatments instead.

rules.name: The Side-Stripe Caveat
rules.body: The list-row::before 3px copper bar is the ONLY permitted side-stripe pattern in the system, and only because it's hover-revealed (scaleY 0 → 1). Don't replicate it on cards, callouts, or alerts.

dos: Do use Tally Copper for primary buttons, focus rings, the wordmark diagonal, and the list-row hover accent. Nothing else.
Do keep neutrals warm. Every gray-feeling color is workshop-stone or warm, never a true-gray.
Do use Newsreader for the wordmark only. Set in 500 weight, tracking -0.01em.
Do cap body line length at 65–75ch.
Do use motion to convey state. btn-press for buttons, cursor-glow + tilt for ProjectCard. 150–250ms with cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1).
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: reduce. The global rule in app.css:113 collapses everything.
Do write copy in past or present tense. 'Built.' 'Ships.' 'Survived.'
donts: Don't build it like generic SaaS gradient hell. No subtle gradients on backgrounds. No glassmorphic cards. No animated mesh backgrounds. No hero-metric blocks. No equal-card-grid product showcases.
Don't make it AI-startup neon-on-black. No dark canvas with electric-blue or lime-green glow. No terminal-styled hero. No monospace as a vibe choice.
Don't make it enterprise B2B navy-and-gray. No navy headers. No stock-photo executives. No 'Trusted by' logo walls.
Don't make it Web3 / crypto. No saturated purples. No generative-art heroes. No animated orbs. No $TOKEN energy.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a permanent colored accent. The list-row hover-stripe is the SINGLE exception.
Don't apply background-clip: text with a gradient. Headlines are solid color.
Don't nest cards. Surfaces with rounded corners don't go inside other surfaces with rounded corners.
Don't ship a button without explicit :hover, :focus-visible, and :active states.
Don't add a second accent color 'for variety.' The One Accent Rule is load-bearing.
Don't write headings in future tense.
Don't use em dashes in user-facing copy. Use commas, periods, semicolons, parentheses.
